help.title: Notes
help.languageNote: Language switching currently applies only within Settings. Other pages will support translation in a future update.
help.callNote: Voice and video calling are prototype features for demonstration purposes and are not fully functional yet.
help.homeNotifNote: The notifications shown on the right side of the Home page represent mutual follows (friends).
help.notifPageNote: The Notifications page shows likes and comments on your posts.
help.eventNote: Event descriptions must be at least 10 characters long otherwise an event cannot be created.
help.messageSearchNote: You can only search the profiles of people you've already messaged. Your full friends list is visible below the Following section on the Messages page.

termsContent:
1. Acceptance of Terms
By accessing or using this platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

2. User Conduct
You are solely responsible for the content you post and any legal consequences arising from it. You agree not to post content that is illegal, harassing, hateful, or that impersonates another person. Content moderation tools are not currently implemented; we may introduce such capabilities in the future.

3. Feature Status
Some features, including voice and video calling, are experimental prototypes and may be unstable, incomplete, or unavailable at times.

4. User Content & Intellectual Property
You retain ownership of any content you post (photos, bio, posts, messages). By posting content, you grant us a limited, non-exclusive license to store and display that content within the app for the purpose of operating the platform. The app's design, branding, and underlying code are our property and may not be copied or redistributed without permission.

5. Disclaimer of Warranties
This platform is provided "as is" and "as available," without warranties of any kind, express or implied. Features may be updated, changed, or expanded in future updates. While we aim for continuous availability, we do not guarantee the platform will be error-free or uninterrupted at all times.

6. Limitation of Liability
To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform, including but not limited to data loss, service interruption, or content posted by other users.

7. Governing Law
These Terms are governed by the laws of Pakistan, without regard to conflict-of-law principles. Any disputes arising from these Terms shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts of Pakistan.

8. Changes to Terms
We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. We encourage you to review this page periodically.

9. Contact Information
For questions about these Terms, contact us at fahadaslam.cust@gmail.com.
privacyContent:
1. Information We Collect
We collect the information you provide when creating and using your account, including your email address, name, password (stored as a secure hash, never in plain text), and optional profile information such as a bio and avatar image. We also collect content you create, including posts, comments, messages, and event details, along with your follower and following relationships. Technical data such as account timestamps and authentication tokens are also stored to operate the service. We do not currently collect phone numbers, precise location data, IP addresses, device information, or analytics data. Your browser's local storage is used to keep you signed in between sessions.

2. How We Use Your Information
Your information is used solely to operate the platform's core features: authenticating your account, displaying your profile to other users, enabling messaging and notifications, and supporting social features such as following, posts, comments, and event participation. We do not use your data for advertising, and we do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.

3. Data Storage & Security
Your data is stored in our database and is not currently encrypted at rest. Messages and other user content are stored in plain text. We use industry-standard password hashing, but we do not currently implement rate limiting, comprehensive input sanitization beyond schema validation, or audit logging. As an actively developed platform, our security practices are evolving, and we encourage you not to share highly sensitive personal information through the platform at this time.

4. Third-Party Services
We do not use any third-party services to send account verification emails, which involves sharing your email address with that provider. We do not currently use any third-party analytics, advertising, cloud storage, or payment services.

5. Your Rights & Choices
You can currently view and edit your profile information, including your name, bio, and avatar, directly within the app. Account deletion and data export tools are not yet available; we plan to introduce these capabilities in future updates. If you have questions about your data in the meantime, please refer to the Terms of Service page for contact information.

6. Changes to This Policy
We may update this Privacy Policy as the platform develops. Continued use of the platform after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
